critical_bugs.issue: Video export only saves first frame as PNG, not actual video
critical_bugs.detail: exportVideo() captures all frames but only writes frames.first as PNG. The comment says 'For now, save as PNG sequence (actual video encoding requires ffmpeg or native)' but this is misleading - it saves ONE frame, not a sequence.
critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Video export feature is completely non-functional. Users expect MP4/GIF output but get a single PNG image.
critical_bugs.fix_required: Either implement actual video encoding (ffmpeg integration) OR remove the feature OR clearly disable the UI until implemented

critical_bugs.issue: GIF encoding uses deprecated image v4.x API - addFrame() on Image
critical_bugs.detail: Code attempts to call firstFrame.addFrame(frames[i]) but the image package v4.x removed Animation class. This pattern is invalid.
critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - AR video export will crash at runtime with NoSuchMethodError
critical_bugs.migration_needed: Must create explicit animation frames list, NOT add frames to Image object
critical_bugs.fix_required: Use img.encodeGif() with duration parameter, passing frames as separate argument (see image package v4.x migration guide)

high_priority_issues.detail: Code waits one frame if debugNeedsPaint is true, but doesn't guarantee the boundary is ready. Could still fail if layout hasn't completed.
high_priority_issues.impact: HIGH - Export may fail on first attempt after navigation or state changes
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add retry logic with exponential backoff, or wait for multiple frames

high_priority_issues.detail: Code has .clamp(1, totalFrames) but this is on the denominator - if totalFrames is 0, it gets clamped to 1, but if totalFrames is 1, the denominator becomes 0 (1-1=0)
high_priority_issues.impact: HIGH - Crash on single-frame video export
high_priority_issues.fix_required: Should be .clamp(1, double.infinity) or handle totalFrames <= 1 case separately

high_priority_issues.issue: No wait for widget tree stabilization before capture
high_priority_issues.detail: Code calls 'await WidgetsBinding.instance.endOfFrame' twice, but this doesn't guarantee shader compilation or texture upload completion for complex fractals
high_priority_issues.impact: HIGH - Batch export may capture blank/incomplete fractals, especially on first frame after preset change
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add configurable delay (50-200ms) after preset application for GPU pipeline to complete

high_priority_issues.issue: Method channel result not validated for null safety
high_priority_issues.detail: invokeMethod returns bool?, defaulting to false if null. This masks platform-side errors - user sees 'failed' but no error details.
high_priority_issues.impact: HIGH - Silent failures with no debugging information
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Distinguish between explicit 'false' return and null (platform error), log platform exceptions

medium_priority_issues.issue: WebP encoding fallback silently converts to PNG
medium_priority_issues.detail: Code comment says 'WebP encoding not available in image package, fallback to PNG' but user selected WebP format
medium_priority_issues.impact: MEDIUM - User confusion when file is PNG instead of requested WebP
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Either implement WebP support or disable the option in UI, don't silently change format

medium_priority_issues.issue: No error handling for file write operations
medium_priority_issues.detail: saveBytes() and exportWithOptions() don't handle disk full, permission denied, or I/O errors
medium_priority_issues.impact: MEDIUM - Unhelpful error messages when storage issues occur
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Wrap file.writeAsBytes() in try-catch with specific error types (FileSystemException)

medium_priority_issues.issue: Camera stream stop error silently ignored
medium_priority_issues.detail: try { await cameraController.stopImageStream(); } catch (_) {} - this could hide important camera state issues
medium_priority_issues.impact: MEDIUM - Camera may get stuck in inconsistent state
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Log the error at minimum, possibly retry or surface to user

medium_priority_issues.issue: Contact sheet generation errors silently ignored
medium_priority_issues.detail: try { contactSheet = await _buildContactSheet(...); } catch (_) {} - user never knows why contact sheet failed
medium_priority_issues.impact: MEDIUM - Missing feature with no user feedback
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Log error, optionally show non-blocking notification to user

medium_priority_issues.issue: Frame capture error handling completes with null instead of rethrowing
medium_priority_issues.detail: On exception during frame capture, code calls finish() and returns null. This loses error context.
medium_priority_issues.impact: MEDIUM - Users get 'null result' instead of actionable error message
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Either complete with partial result (frames captured so far) or rethrow with context

medium_priority_issues.issue: Fixed 16ms delay doesn't account for actual render time
medium_priority_issues.detail: await Future.delayed(const Duration(milliseconds: 16)) assumes render completes instantly
medium_priority_issues.impact: MEDIUM - Fast CPUs waste time, slow CPUs skip frames
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Use WidgetsBinding.instance.endOfFrame or measure actual render duration

low_priority_issues.issue: Watermark text positioning is font-size dependent but uses fixed font
low_priority_issues.detail: Calculation uses text.length * fontSize ~/ 2 with img.arial14 - this is approximate at best
low_priority_issues.impact: LOW - Watermark may be cut off or mispositioned for long text
low_priority_issues.recommendation: Either measure actual text width or use right-aligned positioning

low_priority_issues.issue: Contact sheet uses cubic interpolation for thumbnails
low_priority_issues.detail: img.copyResize(..., interpolation: img.Interpolation.cubic) is slower than linear/nearest for small thumbnails
low_priority_issues.impact: LOW - Unnecessary CPU usage for contact sheet generation
low_priority_issues.recommendation: Use img.Interpolation.linear for thumbnails, cubic only for upscaling

low_priority_issues.detail: Assumes all landscape camera images need rotation, but this depends on device orientation API
low_priority_issues.impact: LOW - Possible incorrect rotation on some devices
low_priority_issues.recommendation: Use camera metadata or device orientation sensor

correctness_verified.status: CORRECT - Properly migrated from old copyInto API to image v4.x compositeImage
CORRECT - Proper usage of img.compositeImage for overlay blending
CORRECT - Properly migrated from Format.bgra to ChannelOrder.bgra for image v4.x
CORRECT - Proper aspect ratio handling with max() to ensure target resolution on both axes
CORRECT - Properly creates metadata with preset name and module info
CORRECT - Uses image.textData for PNG metadata storage (image v4.x compatible)
